steps.title: Find the constant removal rate
steps.content:
In the first 5 hours, the auger removed $$24,000 - 19,350 = 4,650\text{ bushels}$$
The hourly rate is $$\frac{4,650}{5} = 930\text{ bushels per hour}$$

steps.title: Set up and solve the linear equation
steps.content:
The amount of corn remaining after $t$ hours is $$24,000 - 930t$$
When 12,840 bushels remain:
$$24,000 - 930t = 12,840$$
$$930t = 24,000 - 12,840 = 11,160$$
$$t = \frac{11,160}{930} = 12\text{ hours}$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
